questions.question: By how much do Agent Capsules reduce input tokens against a hand-crafted LangGraph 14-agent pipeline?
questions.gold_answer: 51 percent fewer fine-mode input tokens and 42 percent fewer compound-mode input tokens, at quality parity.

questions.question: Which deepagents release introduced first-class MCP support, and what is the public entry point of the package?
questions.gold_answer: deepagents 0.6.2, released May 18 2026, with create_deep_agent(model, tools, system_prompt) as the public entry point.

questions.question: What mechanism does Re-Squared-Search add on top of ReAct, and what is its measured impact on HotpotQA F1?
questions.gold_answer: It adds reasoning reflection. F1 on HotpotQA rises from 41.09 to 60.19 for the ReAct agent.

questions.question: Which transports does FastMCP support and which is recommended for horizontal scaling?
questions.gold_answer: FastMCP supports stdio and HTTP. HTTP is recommended when the server needs to scale horizontally behind a load balancer.

questions.question: What does LongMemEval-V2 measure that the original LongMemEval did not?
questions.gold_answer: V2 measures environment-experience memory (workflow, gotchas, state) for a specific environment, while V1 focused on user-history memory.

questions.question: What is ToolCUA's reported accuracy on OSWorld-MCP and what does it learn that prior CUAs did not?
questions.gold_answer: 46.85 percent on OSWorld-MCP. It learns when to use atomic GUI actions versus high-level tool or API calls, treating that choice as a learned decision.
